document.title: Digital Radiography Console Software User Manual feel-DRCS

sourceSummary.oneLine: User manual for feel-DRCS digital radiography console software, covering installation reference, operation, configuration, DICOM functions, troubleshooting, optional software, and cybersecurity guidance.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Explains how to install and operate feel-DRCS software and provides intended-use, system requirement, configuration, workflow, troubleshooting, and cybersecurity information for clinical use.
keyPoints: feel-DRCS acquires images from DR detectors, processes images for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for PACS integration.
The intended users are radiological doctors and radiological technicians in hospitals.
The product is described as a medical device used as digital X-ray radiography console software and requires connection with an X-ray detector.
Configuration includes DICOM Modality Worklist, DICOM Storage, and DICOM Print settings.
Revision history identifies Rev 008 dated 2023-03-15 as updated.

entities.name: feel-DRCS
entities.evidence: feel-DRCS is the DR console or DR control software that acquires image from the DR detector like flat panel or CCD, processes rapidly for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system.

entities.name: Viewsub
entities.evidence: The Viewsub is a optional software or function and can be used properly as interfaced X-ray generator.

entities.name: feelVIEW
entities.evidence: feelVIEW is the software for detail viewing on the medical or high resolution monitor.

concepts.name: Digital radiography console software
concepts.evidence: feel-DRCS is the DR console or DR control software that acquires image from the DR detector like flat panel or CCD, processes rapidly for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system.

concepts.name: Intended use
concepts.evidence: Feel-DRCS is intended to be used for radiological doctor and radiological technician for acquired general radiographic images.

concepts.name: DICOM Modality Worklist
concepts.evidence: You can set the server’s environment and client’s environment for using DICOM Modality Worklist service.

concepts.name: DICOM Storage
concepts.evidence: This is to set the server’s environments for DICOM transmission.

concepts.name: DICOM Print
concepts.evidence: You can set the server’s environment for DICOM Print.

concepts.name: Cybersecurity essential principles
concepts.evidence: This page provides guidelines on cyber security. Before using the product, the user must clearly understand the contents below and take all controls for cyber security.

evidence.claim: The document is a user manual for Digital Radiography Console Software feel-DRCS.
evidence.evidenceText: Digital Radiography Console Software User Manual feel-DRCS

evidence.claim: The manual identifies User Manual Version 2.1, Revision 008, dated 2023.03.15.
feel-DRCS is DR console or DR control software that acquires images from DR detectors and provides DICOM services for PACS integration.
evidence.evidenceText: feel-DRCS is the DR console or DR control software that acquires image from the DR detector like flat panel or CCD, processes rapidly for clinical application, and provides DICOM services for the integration with PACS system.

evidence.claim: The manual explains how to install and operate feel-DRCS software.
evidence.evidenceText: This manual explains how to install and operate feel-DRCS software.

evidence.claim: feel-DRCS is intended for radiological doctors and radiological technicians acquiring general radiographic images in hospitals.
evidence.evidenceText: Feel-DRCS is intended to be used for radiological doctor and radiological technician for acquired general radiographic images. So, it’s used by radiological doctor or radiological technician in hospital.

evidence.claim: The source states that only legally qualified persons should use the product after becoming familiar with the user manual.
evidence.evidenceText: For proper usage and safety purposes, please ensure that only legally qualified person (Doctor, Medical Treatment Radiological Technologist, Medical Treatment X-RAY Technologist) can use this product after fully familiarize with contents of user manual

evidence.claim: The source states that the product is a medical device and should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.
evidence.evidenceText: This product is a medical device, and it should only be used as digital X-ray radiography console software for X-ray radiography at corresponding hospitals.

evidence.claim: The product needs connection with an X-ray detector and may operate with exposure conditions of an X-ray generator system.
evidence.evidenceText: This medical device can’t use alone. So this product need to connect with X-ray detector. Sometimes, this software operates with exposure condition of X-ray Generator system.

evidence.claim: The workstation requirements include Intel Core i3 or later, 4GB RAM, at least 100GB hard disk, Ethernet network card, Windows 7 Professional SP1 or Windows 10, and required I/O ports.
evidence.evidenceText: Processor: Intel Core i3 or later(recommend : i5 or more); RAM : 4GB RAM(Recommend 8GB); HDD: At least 100GB hard disk; Network Card : 10/100/1000Mbps Ethernet Network Card; Operating System : Windows 7 prof.(at least SP1), Windows 10; Need I/O : 1 Parallel port... 1 Serial port... 1 USB port

evidence.claim: The software supports DICOM Worklist integration with hospital information systems and manual patient information input.
evidence.evidenceText: Through DICOM Worklist, you can input the patient information, integrated with hospital information system (HIS) or input the patient information manually.

evidence.claim: The browser mode can send images to a PACS server, print images, export files, back up images, and restore backup images.
evidence.evidenceText: You can also send to PACS or backup and restore. It is very useful management tool.

evidence.claim: Configuration includes DICOM Modality Worklist server settings.
evidence.evidenceText: You can set the server’s environment and client’s environment for using DICOM Modality Worklist service.

evidence.claim: Configuration includes DICOM Storage server settings for DICOM transmission.
evidence.evidenceText: This is to set the server’s environments for DICOM transmission.

evidence.claim: Configuration includes DICOM Print server settings.
evidence.evidenceText: You can set the server’s environment for DICOM Print.

evidence.claim: The DICOM option appendix states added DICOM Storage Commitment SCU, DICOM Modality Performed Procedure Step SCU, and DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU.
evidence.evidenceText: In this update, feel-DRCS add DICOM Service ( DICOM storage commitment SCU, DICOM Modality Performed Procedure Step SCU, DICOM Query and Retrieve SCU ).

evidence.claim: The cybersecurity appendix provides identification, protection, detection, response, and recovery guidance.
evidence.evidenceText: Cybersecurity Essential Principles – Identification and Protection; Cybersecurity Essential Principles – Detection, Response, Recovery

evidence.claim: Revision history lists Rev 008 dated 2023-03-15 as updated.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority, approval status, device class, or jurisdictional registration is stated in the source text.
authoritySignal is general and the source appears to be a manufacturer user manual rather than an authority-issued regulatory document.
Source text contains OCR or translation quality issues such as misspellings, duplicated appendix numbering, and wording errors; verify against the original PDF before regulatory reuse.
DICOM is referenced, but no DICOM standard version or conformance statement identifier is provided.
